evaluation.summary: A guarded log-gamma approximation yields finite log-binomial terms for large primorials, but the result is a modest numerical stability tweak rather than a fundamental breakthrough.
next_directions: Extend the guarded formulation to larger primorial values and assess error propagation in LDAB calibration.
Benchmark the approach against high-precision arbitrary-precision libraries to quantify numerical gains.
Investigate alternative asymptotic expansions and error-controlled approximations for log-gamma in combinatorial computations.
